# illustrations-undraw

**Count:** 1362 SVG files (target: 200+ — exceeds)
**Source:** unDraw — https://undraw.co (Katerina Limpitsouni)
**Acquired:** git clone of community mirror; flat collection, .git stripped.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

One-line rationale each; single-colour unDraw means we can recolour to any theme accent at render time.

1. `fixing-bugs.svg` — hero slot for evaluator / diagnostic view; figure inspecting a device maps 1:1 to fix-and-flip workflow.
2. `phone-repair.svg` — device-in-hand illustration; obvious fit for iFixit-adjacent repair feasibility section.
3. `selecting.svg` — cursor + object selection; pairs with OpenClaw's browser scrape / marketplace triage UI.
4. `inspection.svg` — magnifier + item; evaluator confidence pipeline, marketplace listing QA.
5. `online-shopping.svg` — cart + product; sell-side flows, listing templates, pricing sheets.
6. `processing.svg` — abstract cogs figure; agent-run / async-job indicator in chat.
7. `warehouse.svg` — inventory stock visual; matches Regan's actual pallet-buy + storage reality.
8. `connected.svg` — devices-and-figures; good for Studio / Pi integration screens.
9. `data-processing.svg` — operator + data; transcripts-analysis / archaeology UI.
10. `empty-street.svg` — used as empty-state background; counterweight to cluttered dashboards.

## Layout

Flat. No subfolders. All files at this root.

## Format

All SVG, single-colour stroke artwork, easy to re-tint via `fill` CSS variable.
